title: Escenti Kids Head Lice Prevention Bundle: Head Lice Shampoo, Tea Tree Conditioner, Leave-in Nit Repellent Spray for Kids with Tea Tree, Lice Bands 8pk & Nits Comb - Complete Lice Treatment Kit by GBH
features: Comprehensive Head Lice Treatment and Defense: This bundle includes Escenti Kids Head Lice Shampoo, Leave In Conditioner With Tea Tree, Escenti Lice Hair Bands 8pk, and a durable nit or lice combs, offering a full spectrum of lice treatment for kids.

Gentle Yet Effective: Specially formulated nit shampoo for kids and conditioner work together to cleanse and detangle hair while providing effective head lice repellent protection without harsh chemicals.

Ease of Use: The nit combs for long thick hair and regular types, along with easy-to-apply lice repellent spray for kids, make Nit Treatment and prevention accessible for parents and comfortable for children.
Natural Ingredients: With the inclusion of tea tree conditioner for head lice, this bundle uses natural ingredients known for their lice treatment and nit repellent properties, safe for daily use.
Prevention & Protection: Escenti Lice Hair Bands and the leave-in conditioner offer ongoing protection against head lice, making this kit an ideal choice for nit prevention in kids.
